description.ko: 순수한 백색광이 침묵을 깨고 크리스탈 프리즘의 정교한 기하학을 통해 찬란한 스펙트럼으로 변모하는 순간을 시각적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A visual study of the moment pure white light breaks its silence, transforming into a vibrant spectrum through the precise geometry of a crystal prism.

prompt: A hyper-realistic, high-resolution cinematic close-up of a sharp-edged triangular glass prism. A single, intense beam of white light enters the prism from the left, refracting and dispersing into a brilliant, wide rainbow spectrum on the right. Caustic light patterns dance on a dark minimalist background, sharp focus on the glass edges, volumetric lighting, 8k, photorealistic, elegant optical physics.
